4_7_89.NKJV: Now when Moses went into the tabernacle of meeting to speak with Him, he heard the voice of One speaking to him from above the mercy seat that was on the ark of the Testimony, from between the two cherubim; thus He spoke to him.
4_7_89.KJV: And when Moses was gone into the tabernacle of the congregation to speak with him, then he heard the voice of one speaking unto him from off the mercy seat that was upon the ark of testimony, from between the two cherubims: and he spake unto him. with him: that is, with God
4_7_89.ESV: And when Moses went into the tent of meeting to speak with the LORD, he heard the voice speaking to him from above the mercy seat that was on the ark of the testimony, from between the two cherubim; and it spoke to him.
4_7_89.NASB: Now when Moses went into the tent of meeting to speak with Him, he heard the voice speaking to him from above the mercy seat that was on the ark of the testimony, from between the two cherubim, so He spoke to him.
4_7_89.NLT: Whenever Moses went into the Tabernacle to speak with the LORD, he heard the voice speaking to him from between the two cherubim above the Ark’s cover — the place of atonement — that rests on the Ark of the Covenant. The LORD spoke to him from there.
4_7_89.WEB: When Moses went into the Tent of Meeting to speak with Yahweh, he heard his voice speaking to him from above the mercy seat that was on the ark of the Testimony, from between the two cherubim: and he spoke to him.
4_7_89.CSB17: When Moses entered the tent of meeting to speak with the LORD, he heard the voice speaking to him from above the mercy seat that was on the ark of the testimony, from between the two cherubim. He spoke to him that way.
4_7_89.AMP: Now when Moses went into the Tent of Meeting (tabernacle) to speak with the LORD, he heard the voice speaking to him from above the mercy seat (the gold cover) that was on the ark of the Testimony from between the two cherubim; and He spoke [by special revelation] to him.
4_7_89.MSG: When Moses entered the Tent of Meeting to speak with God, he heard the Voice speaking to him from between the two angel-cherubim above the Atonement-Cover on the Chest of The Testimony. He spoke with him.
4_7_89.NIV: When Moses entered the Tent of Meeting to speak with the Lord, he heard the voice speaking to him from between the two cherubim above the atonement cover on the ark of the Testimony. And he spoke with him.
4_7_89.NRSVCE: When Moses went into the tent of meeting to speak with the LORD, he would hear the voice speaking to him from above the mercy seat that was on the ark of the covenant from between the two cherubim; thus it spoke to him.

4_8_1.NKJV: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying:
4_8_1.KJV: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,
4_8_1.ESV: Now the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
4_8_1.NASB: Then the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
4_8_1.AMP: Then the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
4_8_1.NIV: Setting Up the LampsThe Lord said to Moses,
4_8_1.NRSVCE: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying:

4_8_2.NKJV: “Speak to Aaron, and say to him, ‘When you arrange the lamps, the seven lamps shall give light in front of the lampstand.’ ”
4_8_2.KJV: Speak unto Aaron, and say unto him, When thou lightest the lamps, the seven lamps shall give light over against the candlestick.
4_8_2.ESV: “Speak to Aaron and say to him, When you set up the lamps, the seven lamps shall give light in front of the lampstand.”
4_8_2.NASB: 'Speak to Aaron and say to him, 'When you mount the lamps, the seven lamps will give light in the front of the lampstand.''
4_8_2.NLT: “Give Aaron the following instructions: When you set up the seven lamps in the lampstand, place them so their light shines forward in front of the lampstand.”
4_8_2.WEB: “Speak to Aaron, and tell him, ‘When you light the lamps, the seven lamps shall give light in front of the lamp stand.’”
4_8_2.CSB17: “Speak to Aaron and tell him: When you set up the lamps, the seven lamps are to give light in front of the lampstand.”
4_8_2.AMP: "Speak to Aaron and say to him, 'When you set up and light the lamps, the seven lamps will shine in front of the lampstand.'"
4_8_2.MSG: "Tell Aaron, Install the seven lamps so they will throw light in front of the Lampstand."
4_8_2.NIV: “Speak to Aaron and say to him, ‘When you set up the seven lamps, they are to light the area in front of the lampstand.’”
4_8_2.NRSVCE: Speak to Aaron and say to him: When you set up the lamps, the seven lamps shall give light in front of the lampstand.

4_8_3.NKJV: And Aaron did so; he arranged the lamps to face toward the front of the lampstand, as the LORD commanded Moses.
4_8_3.KJV: And Aaron did so; he lighted the lamps thereof over against the candlestick, as the LORD commanded Moses.
4_8_3.ESV: And Aaron did so: he set up its lamps in front of the lampstand, as the LORD commanded Moses.
4_8_3.NASB: Aaron therefore did so; he mounted its lamps at the front of the lampstand, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
4_8_3.NLT: So Aaron did this. He set up the seven lamps so they reflected their light forward, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
4_8_3.WEB: Aaron did so. He lit its lamps to light the area in front of the lamp stand, as Yahweh commanded Moses.
4_8_3.CSB17: So Aaron did this; he set up its lamps to give light in front of the lampstand just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
4_8_3.AMP: And Aaron did so; he set up the lamps at the front of the lampstand, just as the LORD had commanded Moses.
4_8_3.MSG: Aaron did just that. He installed the lamps so they threw light in front of the Lampstand, as God had instructed Moses.
4_8_3.NIV: Aaron did so; he set up the lamps so that they faced forward on the lampstand, just as the Lord commanded Moses.
4_8_3.NRSVCE: Aaron did so; he set up its lamps to give light in front of the lampstand, as the LORD had commanded Moses.

4_8_4.NKJV: Now this workmanship of the lampstand was hammered gold; from its shaft to its flowers it was hammered work. According to the pattern which the LORD had shown Moses, so he made the lampstand.
4_8_4.KJV: And this work of the candlestick was of beaten gold, unto the shaft thereof, unto the flowers thereof, was beaten work: according unto the pattern which the LORD had shewed Moses, so he made the candlestick.
4_8_4.ESV: And this was the workmanship of the lampstand, hammered work of gold. From its base to its flowers, it was hammered work; according to the pattern that the LORD had shown Moses, so he made the lampstand.
4_8_4.NASB: Now this was the workmanship of the lampstand, hammered work of gold; from its base to its flowers it was hammered work; according to the pattern which the LORD had showed Moses, so he made the lampstand.
4_8_4.NLT: The entire lampstand, from its base to its decorative blossoms, was made of beaten gold. It was built according to the exact design the LORD had shown Moses.
4_8_4.WEB: This was the workmanship of the lamp stand, beaten work of gold. From its base to its flowers, it was beaten work: according to the pattern which Yahweh had shown Moses, so he made the lamp stand.
4_8_4.CSB17: This is the way the lampstand was made: it was a hammered work of gold, hammered from its base to its flower petals. The lampstand was made according to the pattern the LORD had shown Moses.
4_8_4.AMP: Now this was the workmanship of the lampstand: hammered work of gold; from its base to its flowers it was hammered work; according to the pattern which the LORD had shown Moses, so he made the lampstand.
4_8_4.MSG: The Lampstand was made of hammered gold from its stem to its petals. It was made precisely to the design God had shown Moses.
4_8_4.NIV: This is how the lampstand was made: It was made of hammered gold—from its base to its blossoms. The lampstand was made exactly like the pattern the Lord had shown Moses.
4_8_4.NRSVCE: Now this was how the lampstand was made, out of hammered work of gold. From its base to its flowers, it was hammered work; according to the pattern that the LORD had shown Moses, so he made the lampstand.

4_8_5.NKJV: Then the LORD spoke to Moses, saying:
4_8_5.KJV: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,
4_8_5.ESV: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
4_8_5.NASB: Again the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
4_8_5.NLT: Then the LORD said to Moses,
4_8_5.AMP: Again the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
4_8_5.NIV: The Setting Apart of the LevitesThe Lord said to Moses:
4_8_5.NRSVCE: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying:

4_8_6.NKJV: “Take the Levites from among the children of Israel and cleanse them ceremonially.
4_8_6.KJV: Take the Levites from among the children of Israel, and cleanse them.
4_8_6.ESV: “Take the Levites from among the people of Israel and cleanse them.
4_8_6.NASB: 'Take the Levites from among the sons of Israel and cleanse them.
4_8_6.NLT: “Now set the Levites apart from the rest of the people of Israel and make them ceremonially clean.
4_8_6.WEB: “Take the Levites from among the children of Israel, and cleanse them.
4_8_6.CSB17: “Take the Levites from among the Israelites and ceremonially cleanse them.
4_8_6.AMP: "Take the Levites from among the sons of Israel and cleanse them.
4_8_6.MSG: "Take the Levites from the midst of the People of Israel and purify them for doing God's work.
4_8_6.NIV: “Take the Levites from among the other Israelites and make them ceremonially clean.
4_8_6.NRSVCE: Take the Levites from among the Israelites and cleanse them.

4_8_7.NKJV: Thus you shall do to them to cleanse them: Sprinkle water of purification on them, and let them shave all their body, and let them wash their clothes, and so make themselves clean.
4_8_7.KJV: And thus shalt thou do unto them, to cleanse them: Sprinkle water of purifying upon them, and let them shave all their flesh, and let them wash their clothes, and so make themselves clean. let them shave: Heb. let them cause a razor to pass over, etc
4_8_7.ESV: Thus you shall do to them to cleanse them: sprinkle the water of purification upon them, and let them go with a razor over all their body, and wash their clothes and cleanse themselves.
4_8_7.NASB: 'Thus you shall do to them, for their cleansing: [sprinkle] purifying water on them, and let them use a razor over their whole body and wash their clothes, and they will be clean.
4_8_7.NLT: Do this by sprinkling them with the water of purification, and have them shave their entire body and wash their clothing. Then they will be ceremonially clean.
4_8_7.WEB: You shall do this to them, to cleanse them: sprinkle the water of cleansing on them, let them shave their whole bodies with a razor, and let them wash their clothes, and cleanse themselves.
4_8_7.CSB17: Do this to them for their purification: Sprinkle them with the purification water. Have them shave their entire bodies and wash their clothes, and so purify themselves.
4_8_7.AMP: This is what you shall do to them to [ceremonially] cleanse them: sprinkle the water of purification on them, and let them use a razor over their whole body and wash their clothes, and they will be clean.
4_8_7.MSG: This is the way you will do it: Sprinkle water of absolution on them; have them shave their entire bodies; have them scrub their clothes. Then they will have purified themselves.
4_8_7.NIV: To purify them, do this: Sprinkle the water of cleansing on them; then have them shave their whole bodies and wash their clothes, and so purify themselves.
4_8_7.NRSVCE: Thus you shall do to them, to cleanse them: sprinkle the water of purification on them, have them shave their whole body with a razor and wash their clothes, and so cleanse themselves.

4_8_8.NKJV: Then let them take a young bull with its grain offering of fine flour mixed with oil, and you shall take another young bull as a sin offering.
4_8_8.KJV: Then let them take a young bullock with his meat offering, even fine flour mingled with oil, and another young bullock shalt thou take for a sin offering.
4_8_8.ESV: Then let them take a bull from the herd and its grain offering of fine flour mixed with oil, and you shall take another bull from the herd for a sin offering.
4_8_8.NASB: 'Then let them take a bull with its grain offering, fine flour mixed with oil; and a second bull you shall take for a sin offering.
4_8_8.NLT: Have them bring a young bull and a grain offering of choice flour moistened with olive oil, along with a second young bull for a sin offering.
4_8_8.WEB: Then let them take a young bull, and its meal offering, fine flour mixed with oil; and another young bull you shall take for a sin offering.
4_8_8.CSB17: “They are to take a young bull and its grain offering of fine flour mixed with oil, and you are to take a second young bull for a sin offering.
4_8_8.AMP: Then let them take a young bull and its grain offering of fine flour mixed with oil, and you shall take another young bull as a sin offering.
4_8_8.MSG: "Have them take a young bull with its accompanying Grain-Offering of fine flour mixed with oil, plus a second young bull for an Absolution-Offering.
4_8_8.NIV: Have them take a young bull with its grain offering of fine flour mixed with oil; then you are to take a second young bull for a sin offering.
4_8_8.NRSVCE: Then let them take a young bull and its grain offering of choice flour mixed with oil, and you shall take another young bull for a sin offering.

4_8_9.NKJV: And you shall bring the Levites before the tabernacle of meeting, and you shall gather together the whole congregation of the children of Israel.
4_8_9.KJV: And thou shalt bring the Levites before the tabernacle of the congregation: and thou shalt gather the whole assembly of the children of Israel together:
4_8_9.ESV: And you shall bring the Levites before the tent of meeting and assemble the whole congregation of the people of Israel.
4_8_9.NASB: 'So you shall present the Levites before the tent of meeting. You shall also assemble the whole congregation of the sons of Israel,
4_8_9.NLT: Then assemble the whole community of Israel, and present the Levites at the entrance of the Tabernacle.
4_8_9.WEB: You shall present the Levites before the Tent of Meeting. You shall assemble the whole congregation of the children of Israel.
4_8_9.CSB17: Bring the Levites before the tent of meeting and assemble the entire Israelite community.
4_8_9.AMP: You shall present the Levites before the Tent of Meeting (tabernacle), and you shall also assemble the whole congregation of the children of Israel,
4_8_9.MSG: Bring the Levites to the front of the Tent of Meeting and gather the entire community of Israel.
4_8_9.NIV: Bring the Levites to the front of the Tent of Meeting and assemble the whole Israelite community.
4_8_9.NRSVCE: You shall bring the Levites before the tent of meeting, and assemble the whole congregation of the Israelites.

4_8_10.NKJV: So you shall bring the Levites before the LORD, and the children of Israel shall lay their hands on the Levites;
4_8_10.KJV: And thou shalt bring the Levites before the LORD: and the children of Israel shall put their hands upon the Levites:
4_8_10.ESV: When you bring the Levites before the LORD, the people of Israel shall lay their hands on the Levites,
4_8_10.NASB: and present the Levites before the LORD; and the sons of Israel shall lay their hands on the Levites.
4_8_10.NLT: When you present the Levites before the LORD, the people of Israel must lay their hands on them.
4_8_10.WEB: You shall present the Levites before Yahweh. The children of Israel shall lay their hands on the Levites,
4_8_10.CSB17: Then present the Levites before the LORD, and have the Israelites lay their hands on them.
4_8_10.AMP: and present the Levites before the LORD, and the Israelites shall lay their hands on the Levites.
4_8_10.MSG: Present the Levites before God as the People of Israel lay their hands on them.
4_8_10.NIV: You are to bring the Levites before the Lord, and the Israelites are to lay their hands on them.
4_8_10.NRSVCE: When you bring the Levites before the LORD, the Israelites shall lay their hands on the Levites,

4_8_11.NKJV: and Aaron shall offer the Levites before the LORD like a wave offering from the children of Israel, that they may perform the work of the LORD.
4_8_11.KJV: And Aaron shall offer the Levites before the LORD for an offering of the children of Israel, that they may execute the service of the LORD. offer: Heb. wave offering: Heb. wave offering they: Heb. they may be to execute, etc
4_8_11.ESV: and Aaron shall offer the Levites before the LORD as a wave offering from the people of Israel, that they may do the service of the LORD.
4_8_11.NASB: 'Aaron then shall present the Levites before the LORD as a wave offering from the sons of Israel, that they may qualify to perform the service of the LORD.
4_8_11.NLT: Raising his hands, Aaron must then present the Levites to the LORD as a special offering from the people of Israel, thus dedicating them to the LORD’s service.
4_8_11.WEB: and Aaron shall offer the Levites before Yahweh for a wave offering, on the behalf of the children of Israel, that it may be theirs to do the service of Yahweh.
4_8_11.CSB17: Aaron is to present the Levites before the LORD as a presentation offering from the Israelites, so that they may perform the LORD’s work.
4_8_11.AMP: "Aaron shall present the Levites before the LORD as a wave offering from the Israelites, so that they may perform the service of the LORD.
4_8_11.MSG: Aaron will present the Levites before God as a Wave-Offering from the People of Israel so that they will be ready to do God's work.
4_8_11.NIV: Aaron is to present the Levites before the Lord as a wave offering from the Israelites, so that they may be ready to do the work of the Lord.
4_8_11.NRSVCE: and Aaron shall present the Levites before the LORD as an elevation offering from the Israelites, that they may do the service of the LORD.

4_8_12.NKJV: Then the Levites shall lay their hands on the heads of the young bulls, and you shall offer one as a sin offering and the other as a burnt offering to the LORD, to make atonement for the Levites.
4_8_12.KJV: And the Levites shall lay their hands upon the heads of the bullocks: and thou shalt offer the one for a sin offering, and the other for a burnt offering, unto the LORD, to make an atonement for the Levites.
4_8_12.ESV: Then the Levites shall lay their hands on the heads of the bulls, and you shall offer the one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering to the LORD to make atonement for the Levites.
4_8_12.NASB: 'Now the Levites shall lay their hands on the heads of the bulls; then offer the one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering to the LORD, to make atonement for the Levites.
4_8_12.NLT: “Next the Levites will lay their hands on the heads of the young bulls. Present one as a sin offering and the other as a burnt offering to the LORD, to purify the Levites and make them right with the LORD.
4_8_12.WEB: “The Levites shall lay their hands on the heads of the bulls, and you shall offer the one for a sin offering, and the other for a burnt offering to Yahweh, to make atonement for the Levites.
4_8_12.CSB17: Next the Levites are to lay their hands on the heads of the bulls. Sacrifice one as a sin offering and the other as a burnt offering to the LORD, to make atonement for the Levites.
4_8_12.AMP: Then the Levites shall lay their hands on the heads of the bulls, then you are to offer the one as a sin offering and the other as a burnt offering to the LORD, to make atonement for the Levites.
4_8_12.MSG: "Have the Levites place their hands on the heads of the bulls, selecting one for the Absolution-Offering and another for the Whole-Burnt-Offering to God to make atonement for the Levites.
4_8_12.NIV: “After the Levites lay their hands on the heads of the bulls, use the one for a sin offering to the Lord and the other for a burnt offering, to make atonement for the Levites.
4_8_12.NRSVCE: The Levites shall lay their hands on the heads of the bulls, and he shall offer the one for a sin offering and the other for a burnt offering to the LORD, to make atonement for the Levites.

4_8_13.NKJV: “And you shall stand the Levites before Aaron and his sons, and then offer them like a wave offering to the LORD.
4_8_13.KJV: And thou shalt set the Levites before Aaron, and before his sons, and offer them for an offering unto the LORD.
4_8_13.ESV: And you shall set the Levites before Aaron and his sons, and shall offer them as a wave offering to the LORD.
4_8_13.NASB: 'You shall have the Levites stand before Aaron and before his sons so as to present them as a wave offering to the LORD.
4_8_13.NLT: Then have the Levites stand in front of Aaron and his sons, and raise your hands and present them as a special offering to the LORD.
4_8_13.WEB: You shall set the Levites before Aaron, and before his sons, and offer them as a wave offering to Yahweh.
4_8_13.CSB17: “You are to have the Levites stand before Aaron and his sons, and you are to present them before the LORD as a presentation offering.
4_8_13.AMP: You shall have the Levites stand before Aaron and his sons and present them as a wave offering to the LORD.
4_8_13.MSG: Then have the Levites stand in front of Aaron and his sons and present them as a Wave-Offering to God.
4_8_13.NIV: Have the Levites stand in front of Aaron and his sons and then present them as a wave offering to the Lord.
4_8_13.NRSVCE: Then you shall have the Levites stand before Aaron and his sons, and you shall present them as an elevation offering to the LORD.

4_8_14.NKJV: Thus you shall separate the Levites from among the children of Israel, and the Levites shall be Mine.
4_8_14.KJV: Thus shalt thou separate the Levites from among the children of Israel: and the Levites shall be mine.

4_8_14.NASB: 'Thus you shall separate the Levites from among the sons of Israel, and the Levites shall be Mine.
4_8_14.NLT: In this way, you will set the Levites apart from the rest of the people of Israel, and the Levites will belong to me.
4_8_14.WEB: Thus you shall separate the Levites from among the children of Israel, and the Levites shall be mine.
4_8_14.CSB17: In this way you are to separate the Levites from the rest of the Israelites so that the Levites will belong to me.
4_8_14.AMP: "Thus you shall separate the Levites from among the Israelites, and the Levites shall be Mine [in a very special sense].
4_8_14.MSG: This is the procedure for setting apart the Levites from the rest of the People of Israel; the Levites are exclusively for my use.
4_8_14.NIV: In this way you are to set the Levites apart from the other Israelites, and the Levites will be mine.
4_8_14.NRSVCE: Thus you shall separate the Levites from among the other Israelites, and the Levites shall be mine.

4_8_15.NKJV: After that the Levites shall go in to service the tabernacle of meeting. So you shall cleanse them and offer them like a wave offering.
4_8_15.KJV: And after that shall the Levites go in to do the service of the tabernacle of the congregation: and thou shalt cleanse them, and offer them for an offering.

4_8_15.NRSVCE: Thereafter the Levites may go in to do service at the tent of meeting, once you have cleansed them and presented them as an elevation offering.

4_8_16.NKJV: For they are wholly given to Me from among the children of Israel; I have taken them for Myself instead of all who open the womb, the firstborn of all the children of Israel.
4_8_16.KJV: For they are wholly given unto me from among the children of Israel; instead of such as open every womb, even instead of the firstborn of all the children of Israel, have I taken them unto me.
4_8_16.ESV: For they are wholly given to me from among the people of Israel. Instead of all who open the womb, the firstborn of all the people of Israel, I have taken them for myself.
4_8_16.NASB: for they are wholly given to Me from among the sons of Israel. I have taken them for Myself instead of every first issue of the womb, the firstborn of all the sons of Israel.
4_8_16.NLT: “Of all the people of Israel, the Levites are reserved for me. I have claimed them for myself in place of all the firstborn sons of the Israelites; I have taken the Levites as their substitutes.
4_8_16.WEB: For they are wholly given to me from among the children of Israel; instead of all who open the womb, even the firstborn of all the children of Israel, I have taken them to me.
4_8_16.CSB17: For they have been exclusively assigned to me from the Israelites. I have taken them for myself in place of all who come first from the womb, every Israelite firstborn.
4_8_16.AMP: for they are wholly given to Me from among the Israelites. I have taken them for Myself instead of all who are born first, the firstborn of all the Israelites.
4_8_16.MSG: The Levites have been selected out of the People of Israel for my exclusive use; they function in place of every firstborn male born to an Israelite woman.
4_8_16.NIV: They are the Israelites who are to be given wholly to me. I have taken them as my own in place of the firstborn, the first male offspring from every Israelite woman.
4_8_16.NRSVCE: For they are unreservedly given to me from among the Israelites; I have taken them for myself, in place of all that open the womb, the firstborn of all the Israelites.

4_8_17.NKJV: For all the firstborn among the children of Israel are Mine, both man and beast; on the day that I struck all the firstborn in the land of Egypt I sanctified them to Myself.
4_8_17.KJV: For all the firstborn of the children of Israel are mine, both man and beast: on the day that I smote every firstborn in the land of Egypt I sanctified them for myself.
4_8_17.ESV: For all the firstborn among the people of Israel are mine, both of man and of beast. On the day that I struck down all the firstborn in the land of Egypt I consecrated them for myself,
4_8_17.NASB: 'For every firstborn among the sons of Israel is Mine, among the men and among the animals; on the day that I struck down all the firstborn in the land of Egypt I sanctified them for Myself.
4_8_17.NLT: For all the firstborn males among the people of Israel are mine, both of people and of animals. I set them apart for myself on the day I struck down all the firstborn sons of the Egyptians.
4_8_17.WEB: For all the firstborn among the children of Israel are mine, both man and animal. On the day that I struck all the firstborn in the land of Egypt, I sanctified them for myself.
4_8_17.CSB17: For every firstborn among the Israelites is mine, both man and animal. I consecrated them to myself on the day I struck down every firstborn in the land of Egypt.

4_8_19.MSG: selected out of the People of Israel, and I have given the Levites to Aaron and his sons to do all the work involved in the Tent of Meeting on behalf of all the People of Israel and to make atonement for them so that nothing bad will happen to them when they approach the Sanctuary."
